posts.imageAltDesc: Vintage Visa magazine advertisement showing a person surrounded by electronic gadgets using a laptop while seated on public transit, with the slogan “Be whoever you want to be.”

Four characters sit on folding chairs in a wooded area, each holding a mug. From left to right: a woman in a red jacket, a bald man in a police uniform, a man in a plaid blazer and cowboy hat, and another man in a police uniform with long hair. The group appears focused and contemplative, surrounded by trees and fallen leaves.
